overview: Maktab Zaid Bin Sabit Management System — a comprehensive Islamic school management platform with role-based access for Admin, Ustaad (teachers), and Parents. Manage students, attendance, fees, sabak progress, and reports.
features: Role-based login for Admin, Ustaad, and Parents
Admin dashboard with Morning/Afternoon/Evening student filters
Monthly PDF report downloads per class and per Ustaad
Editable Admin profile and settings with dark/light mode
Ustaad panel with strict permissions and sabak categories
Ustaad notifications center with View All page
Parent About Us page with mission, vision, and upcoming courses
